rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Leandro Ferreira, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Email Address in Redirection Url

rules.rule_text:
title: Email Address in Redirection Url
id: 32b3054c-762f-4e7f-b604-524548e5da00
description: URL containing potential email address, on a domain that has been known
  to redirect users to phishing sites.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Leandro Ferreira, Patrik Olson
date: '2023-07-04'
modified: '2023-12-04'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  redirector:
    cs-host|endswith:
    - codesandbox.io
    - r20.rs6.net
    - tracker.club-os.com
    - actk.ke
    - secure.adnxs.com
    - go.skimresources.com
    - r.smore.com
    - apiservices.krxd.net
  plain_email:
  - c-uri|re:
    - '@[^&/]+\.(com|no|se)'
  - c-uri-query|re:
    - '@[^&/]+\.(com|no|se)'
  base64_tlds:
    c-uri|re:
    - (LmNvb|5jb2|uY29t)
    c-uri-query|re:
    - (LmNvb|5jb2|uY29t)
  filter:
  - url|contains:
    - ssp.disqus.com
  condition: redirector and (plain_email or base64_tlds) and not filter
falsepositives:
- Surely. Visit the URL to verify if it is a phishing page
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
